scope: Core radio procedure batch merged into starter.json after Sea Speak Linguist review, Director-Engineer matcher fix, and QA acceptance.

qa_notes.linguist_note: Keep as the message marker, not a free synonym like inquiry.
Reply/response are ordinary English; draft keeps the trained message marker answer.
Confirmed strict marker policy: reject info. The drill trains the formal message marker information.
Do not accept danger; it loses the message-marker function.
Order may be close in ordinary English but is not the trained marker here.
Confirmed strict marker policy: advise is a verb, not the marker noun. It must stay wrong even if typo matching sees it as close to advice.
Demand changes tone and authority; keep wrong unless linguist decides otherwise.
Intend is grammatically close but not the message marker.
Correction introduces the corrected message; correct is a confirmation.
Numbers/digits are ordinary paraphrases; draft keeps the formal procedure word.
Spelling reports a mode; spell is the command/request form for this drill.
Confirmed: wait and stand by stay separate in training. Do not accept wait out or stand by for this word item.
Continue is ordinary English; draft keeps the procedure word resume.
Confirmed strictness: decimal is the radio form for this drill; point, dot, and comma stay wrong.
Confirmed strictness: this drill trains the radio pronunciation niner; ordinary nine stays wrong.

dangerous_minimal_pairs: radio check / how do you read me
qa_notes.linguist_note: How do you read me is related but not the same prompt.
Calling can appear in station calls but should not replace the identification marker.
Keep as a calling phrase element, not a general call verb.
Do not accept repeat; this protects the existing Sea Speak distinction.

should_accept: please stand by for one minute
qa_notes.linguist_note: Confirmed safe: stand by for one minute preserves the same standby instruction and time value.
Confirmed safe for this generic readback command: read it back preserves the readback action. Do not accept say again or repeat.
Incorrect is ordinary English; draft keeps the specific correction signal wrong.
That is correct is accepted but risky; do not collapse correct with affirmative.
Draft rejects numbers follow to preserve the procedure word.
Before/after direction must not be fuzzed.
Before/after direction must not be fuzzed.
Confirmed safe: do not reply keeps the same instruction as do not answer. Keep separate from stand by, wait, and go ahead.
Communications plural is accepted as grammar variation.
Distinguish request spell from sender marker I spell.
High-risk because out appears inside the phrase; matcher must not accept out alone.

should_reject: how do you read me over
qa_notes.linguist_note: Protect over as invitation to reply; do not accept out or over and out.

dangerous_minimal_pairs: how do you read me / radio check
qa_notes.linguist_note: How do you read is accepted as a shortened standard query; can you hear me is too ordinary.

items.target_text: I read you loud and clear.
accepted_answers: i read you loud and clear

should_accept: I read you loud and clear.
qa_notes.linguist_note: Confirmed safe as a shortened readability report. It must not collapse into roger, affirmative, or I hear you.

items.target_text: Aurora, this is sailing yacht Orion.
accepted_answers: aurora this is sailing yacht orion
aurora this is s y orion

should_accept: Aurora, this is sailing yacht Orion.
qa_notes.linguist_note: S/Y variants are accepted following starter policy; station order must stay protected.

accepted_answers: marina control sailing yacht aurora calling
marina control s y aurora calling

should_accept: Marina Control sailing yacht Aurora calling
should_reject: Marina Control this is motor yacht Aurora
qa_notes.linguist_note: Confirmed station-call policy: called station first. Aurora to Marina Control remains rejected, matching starter policy.
Confirmed safe: change/go to channel one two follow starter channel-change policy. Channel digits stay strict.
Readback compact form is accepted; numeric order must stay exact.
Draft requires correction marker; bare channel one three is not enough for this drill.
Draft requires the question marker; plain question without marker should fail for this item.
Do not accept yes or roger; affirmative is the target answer value.
Do not accept no; this protects the existing negative policy.
Please read back is intentionally rejected in draft because this drills the request marker.
Confirmed safe: say again position keeps the target object. Repeat and read back remain wrong.

items.target_text: Stand by on channel one six.
accepted_answers: stand by on channel one six

should_accept: Stand by on channel one six.
should_reject: stand by on channel one two
qa_notes.linguist_note: Do not accept switch; standing by on a channel is not changing channel.

items.source_text: Не отвечайте, пока вас не вызовут.

qa_notes.linguist_note: Confirmed safe: do not reply until called keeps the same prohibition. Do not accept stand by or wait for this item.
Resume and go ahead should remain separate procedure concepts.

items.source_text: Ждите, связь временно заканчиваю, я вызову снова.
items.target_text: Wait out, I will call you again.
accepted_answers: wait out i will call you again
wait out will call you again

should_accept: Wait out, I will call you again.
wait out will call you again
should_reject: wait over i will call you again
stand by i will call you again
out i will call you again
qa_notes.linguist_note: High-risk phrase because over/out confusion can creep in by typo or paraphrase.

items.source_text: Исправление: моё ETA один пять ноль ноль UTC.
items.target_text: Correction, my ETA is one five zero zero UTC.
accepted_answers: correction my eta is one five zero zero utc
correction eta one five zero zero utc
correction my eta one five zero zero utc
correction my eta is one five zero zero zulu
correction eta one five zero zero zulu

should_accept: Correction, my ETA is one five zero zero UTC.
should_reject: correction my eta is one four zero zero utc
qa_notes.linguist_note: Numeric tokens must not be fuzzy; draft requires correction marker for this item.
Callsign as one word is accepted as spelling variation.

items.source_text: Диктую Aurora по буквам: Alfa Uniform Romeo Oscar Romeo Alfa.
items.target_text: I spell Aurora: Alfa Uniform Romeo Oscar Romeo Alfa.
accepted_answers: i spell aurora alfa uniform romeo oscar romeo alfa
i spell alfa uniform romeo oscar romeo alfa
aurora alfa uniform romeo oscar romeo alfa

should_accept: I spell Aurora: Alfa Uniform Romeo Oscar Romeo Alfa.
i spell alfa uniform romeo oscar romeo alfa
Aurora Alfa Uniform Romeo Oscar Romeo Alfa
should_reject: i spell aurora alpha uniform romeo oscar romeo alpha
i repeat aurora alfa uniform romeo oscar romeo alfa
qa_notes.linguist_note: Confirmed strictness: keep official ICAO/IMO Alfa. Reject Alpha even though it is common ordinary spelling.

examples: I read you loud and clear.

grammar_patterns.pattern: Called station + this is + vessel name
examples: Aurora, this is sailing yacht Orion.

grammar_patterns.pattern: Stand by on channel + channel number
examples: Stand by on channel one six.
Wait out, I will call you again.
Correction, my ETA is one five zero zero UTC.

grammar_patterns.pattern: I spell + identifier + spelling alphabet sequence
examples: I spell Aurora: Alfa Uniform Romeo Oscar Romeo Alfa.

dangerous_minimal_pairs.reason: Over invites a reply; out closes or suspends the exchange. Wait out must not become out alone.
Repeat is not accepted as a substitute for say again in this Sea Speak training.
Roger acknowledges receipt, affirmative means yes, and correct confirms accuracy.
Answer value is operationally opposite and must not be fuzzed.
Read back is receiver confirmation; say again asks the sender to retransmit.
Channel digits must not be typo-corrected or semantically substituted.
ETA time digits must not be corrected by typo or semantic matching.

phrase_core_i_spell_aurora_001: i spell aurora alfa uniform romeo oscar romeo alfa
i spell aurora alpha uniform romeo oscar romeo alpha

dangerous_minimal_pairs.reason: Confirmed: keep official ICAO/IMO spelling alphabet form Alfa; Alpha stays wrong for this training item.
Advice is the message-marker noun; advise is a verb. The typo layer must not accept this one-letter grammatical change.

linguist_review_notes.note: Decision: reject info for the information marker; keep stand by for one minute, read it back, do not reply, shortened loud and clear, and go/change to channel one two as safe item-local variants.
Confirmed: phrase marker drills require explicit Question, Request, or Answer. Plain forms without the marker stay wrong.
Confirmed: wait, stand by, wait out, do not answer, resume communication, and go ahead are intentionally separated.
Decision: keep strict forms. Reject numbers for figures, point/dot for decimal, nine for niner, and Alpha for Alfa.
Station order is protected. Draft follows existing starter policy and rejects forms like Aurora to Marina Control.
